raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I started to receive txt messages spams and email spams, over XXXX messages in under about XXXX mins. I did not know what was going on. Then I received an alert about a best buy purchase on my macys XXXX XXXX and an apple order. I immediately answered to macys txt message about charge being a fraud. And I even called right after to confirm that best buy and apple purchases were not mine. Both purchases were taken care and i received a new credit card from macys, but last week the apple purchase off XXXX reappeared on my macys credit card. I immediately called them again and questioned the charge. Macys said according to XXXX the purchase was legit. It was an online apple purchase. I once again disputed the charge. And I asked macys XXXX XXXX what else can I do to help myself. They told me to create an identity fraud alert on the credit breau which I did on equifax and I also filed a report on XXXX and emailed macys XXXX XXXX the report. Macys also advised me to contact apple which I called apple on XX/XX/year> and filled a complaint on there as well. Spoke with a rep and told them that I never authorized a charge and that I called my credit card company the same day to advise them that the charge was fraud. XXXX said that the item was delivered to my address by uber. I asked XXXX did the XXXX driver ask for ID? XXXX did not find record of XXXX asking for ID or signature. I dont know how XXXX or XXXX not request ID on such a high priced ticket item. I told XXXX to please create this case for me and to please report device as stolen so the fraudulent person can have no use of it. Macys is still currently investigating and im waiting on apples response as well. I did my part and reported this fraudulent activity. I am asking for the charge of XXXX from apple to be removed from my account and that macys be more fast acting on their part and apple be more vigilant and be more secure with delivery purchases. Thank you. I hope a resolution.
